title: Amtech B4290 Wire Stripper with Crimper
features: VERSATILE: This multi-use wire stripper and crimper is suitable for a wide range of wire and cable sizes and is ideal DIY, home and garden use
FEATURES: With a safety lock catch and a maximum 20mm jaw opening, it has a 4mm-5mm 2 single core sheath stripper and a 8-16 AWG gauge cable stripper
PRACTICAL SIZE: 20mm length provides reach and stability.
PRECISION CONTROL: Easy to handle with good balance for accurate work.
COMPACT DESIGN: BACKED BY AMTECH S Backed by Amtech’s 3-year guarantee with UK-based aftercare.
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your hand tools requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
